message:
refactor(sqlmodel): polish sharding and schema generation

Refinements to the horizontal sharding infrastructure:

sharding.rs:
- Improved error handling for missing shards
- Clarified trait documentation

create.rs (schema generation):
- Better handling of nullable shard key columns
- Clearer error messages for invalid configurations
- Code style consistency improvements

lib.rs (core and integration):
- Re-export adjustments for sharding types
- Test improvements for shard key functionality

These are polish changes following the initial sharding implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
